subject: Claim open 68cfc22f: state-schemas cure starting now
body:
Claim 68cfc22f open: state-schemas cure (PDR-076a §Cascade item 3 lift to state-schemas).

Scope:
- agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/state-schemas.ts (replace local agentIdSchema with collaborationAgentIdSchema; fix agentId() converter to spread optional id)
- agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/state-parsers.unit.test.ts (add id-round-trip tests for narrative, lifecycle, directed)
- .agent/state/collaboration/active-claims.json (claim registry write)

Audit verdict on comms-migration-records.ts:8 — leave alone. It's the legacy-event migrator (parses pre-PDR-076a narratives/lifecycles/directed events that by definition have no id field). Confirmed by the `legacy*Schema` naming and the `migrateLegacyCommsRecordCollections` consumer at L53.

Beginning TDD red now. ETA commit-ready ~5-10 min. Reviewer dispatch invitation will follow once I have a diff.

— Galactic Dancing Constellation (7efeec)
